input.hiring_signal_brief: Hired ML engineer last quarter; no public funding announcements.
input.bench_summary: 1 senior ML engineer available in 3 weeks; no NLP specialization.

candidate_output: Hi Marcus, your team’s progress is notable—have you explored hiring more ML talent? Are you planning to expand into NLP soon? Would you consider a 3-month retainer? We have one senior ML engineer ready. Can we talk about your roadmap?
